element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core offensive and mobility mechanic from first game, refined

element_introduction_order.element: Drill jump aimed straight down (Drop Drill)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: New mechanic enabling direct downward attacks on enemies below
Secondary offensive option carried from first game
Exploration reward; levels designed with many secrets
Unlocks cup-switching bonus game for extra life
World-specific dangers increase in complexity; ancient castle theme

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Unknown - PAL version has unbeatable level due to cannon oversight
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Framerate-dependent mechanic; problematic in PAL version

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Levels significantly longer than first game with alternating safe/dangerous sections; exploration breaks punctuate action sequences

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Vertical crevices and elevated areas containing secret passages; off-path exploration rewarded with hidden letter collectibles
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Four hidden AERO letters per act encourage systematic exploration; secret areas contain bonus items and checkpoints

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of core mechanics (drill jump, drop drill, stars) in manageable level layout; World 1-2 establish baseline platforming
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Levels expand in size and complexity; secret areas become more obscure; environmental hazards increase per world theme
difficulty_curve.late_game: World 8 (final) has different structure (no three-act division); heightened enemy density and hazard combinations
notable_spikes: PAL version unbeatable level (cannon framerate bug)
Levels increase in length significantly vs first game

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of worlds 1-7 divided into three acts; World 8 diverges from pattern. Each act contains exit goal, enemies, power-ups, and four hidden AERO letters
Eight distinct worlds with environmental themes (ancient castle, museum of horrors setting). Backgrounds rendered with SGI technology
Ingeniously designed secret areas throughout; exploration-focused level design rewards thorough examination of terrain
No timer, no objectives beyond reaching exit; no point-based progression. Emphasizes traversal and exploration over speed-running
